name: Monster Union
startIntroPart1: You were chosen, chosen to rule this empire, to keep stability between all the monster race, to defend it from all source of danger and many other things.
startIntroPart2: Will your empire spread like rime across the earth? Then show them how capable you are and show how strong the unity is.
declaringWar: Your flame will flicker and die beneath the coming frost.
attacked: You strike at ice eternal. It does not shatter — it waits.
defeated: Even glaciers break... but winter always returns.
introduction: I am Boreas, voice of the blizzard. Tread lightly, for you walk frozen ground.
neutralHello: The chill does not bite... unless provoked.
hateHello: You will know true stillness — when your world freezes over.
tradeRequest: A shard of ice can reflect many truths. Let us see what benefit lies between us.
uniques: Comment [Special Units can freeze over any tile, allowing all land units to go over water and reducing movement and sight of enemy units.]
Comment [Gains free Special Units for entering new era.]
Comment [Gain access to special mushrooms that allow you to create units and do research]
Comment [Gain access to swarm units that will help you]
Comment [Capital city gains more stats per every turn. other cities can slowly gain the same buff overtime.]
Comment [[Herald of Everwinter can use [Eternal Freeze], buffing all Land units and buffing all Heralds.]]

civilopediaText.text: The Monster Union were union between three monster kingdom.
The Frostborne from the tundra, the Coleopteran from the desert, and the fungus from the swamp
After long war, each kingdom aware that there's bigger threat than they are imagine and so to combat that they form a union.

civilopediaText.test: The Union were ruled by the tree principles, each principles represent the there monster race. no monster has higher rights than other monsters, in order to maintenance peace and balance between monster
